column2: Commit consistently by vintage year to avoid another lost decade for CalPERS PE from under-allocation and procyclicality
Invest in diverse and emerging managers to improve returns
Engage with investment partners to prioritize sustainable investment frameworks, such as Climate and Labor Principles
Diversify the portfolio with Venture and Growth strategies to reduce Buyout exposure proportionally
Recompose the Buyout portfolio from Mega/Large to Middle Market
Make manager selection the centerpiece of the investment process

•
Reduce costs by increasing co-investment without management fees or carry to enhance net returns
